title: glyceria glumaris
intro: Glyceria glumaris, also known as manna grass, is a perennial aquatic plant species belonging to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Glyceria glumaris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Glyceria glumaris can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
